title: Simulation DDL Planner Worker v1
determinism: Must derive DDL planning output only from declared simulation planning artifacts.
Must not emit live SQL under infra/postgres/init in this phase.
Must not write to AI-control roots.

notes: Planning scope may target timelines, checkpoints, cursors, tick ledger, or snapshot materializations.
Phase L defines DDL planning only and does not allow live migration emission.
Future phases may convert approved plans into real DDL artifacts.
